CREATE TABLE users (username VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO users VALUES ('hello'), ('world'), ('hell'), ('helicopter'), ('lo'), ('low'), ('hi');
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE '%lo';
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE 'h%';
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE 'h%%o';
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE 'lo%';
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE '%l%o';
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE '_e%';
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT, user_id INT);
INSERT INTO orders VALUES (1, 1), (2, 1), (3, 2);
SELECT u.username FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.username LIKE '%h%' WHERE o.order_id = 1;
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE (SELECT CONCAT('%', 'lo', '%'));
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE (SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE '%l%');
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE 'hello' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE order_id = 2));
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_users AS SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE '%o';
SELECT * FROM temp_users;
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username LIKE '%' || 'lo' || '%' AND username LIKE '%' || (SELECT 'h') || '%';
CREATE TABLE products (product_name VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO products VALUES ('hello world'), ('goodbye'), ('helicopter'), ('low-flyer');
SELECT p.product_name FROM products p WHERE p.product_name LIKE '%low%' AND p.product_name NOT LIKE '%fly%';
